evidence_quotes.quote: deleting, rendering unusable or denying access to any kind of digital good purchased by a customer

paragraphs.text: I'd like to ask the EU Commission to consider including provisions against any kind of media company and media distributor deleting, rendering unusable or denying access to any kind of digital good purchased by a customer, and to make digital goods equal in every aspect to physical goods in terms of customer rights and protections. I was spurred to make this request by the Stop Destroying Videogames initiative, which I have already signed, but I recognize this is an issue that doesn't just affect videogames. It's an issue that affects literally any kind of media ever produced and distributed, causing untold amounts of destruction for many art forms. This needs to stop, and customers need to be able to keep and do as they please with the goods they purchase, irrespective of the goods' format. Ownership is a right, not a suggestion.
